description: Beautiful landscape, nature scenery, zero human presence, ethereal mood, New Age, Pastorale style, Celtic influences
image_prompt_template: Beautiful landscape photography style. {scene}. Natural scenery, ethereal lighting, dreamy colors, New Age aesthetic. Detailed environment with atmospheric elements. Perfect composition, professional lighting, serene and majestic mood. High quality, cinematic, nature focused.
video_prompt_template: Beautiful landscape cinematic video. {scene}. Natural scenery, ethereal lighting, dreamy colors, New Age aesthetic. Cinematic still shot, locked perspective, zero camera movement. Static camera, subtle environmental motion (clouds, water, light shifting). Atmospheric details, serene and majestic mood, minimal camera movement. Professional composition, cinematic quality, nature focused, 30 second duration. Negative: panning, zooming, drone, walking, motion blur, tracking, dolly.
negative_prompt: 人, 人物, 臉, 人臉, 人類, face, people, human, person, indoor, 室內, 建築, building
no_people_suffix: , no people, no humans, landscape only, 4k scenic view, static camera
scene_suggestions: misty Celtic highlands with ancient stones and morning fog
breathtaking aurora borealis over a mirror-like lake
serene forest path with dappled sunlight and ethereal glowing motes
epic canyon with majestic golden hour light
starry night sky over a peaceful calm ocean
rolling green hills resembling a serene pastorale painting
tropical waterfall in an emerald forest with soft glowing mist
majestic snow-capped mountain reflecting in crystal clear water
